accepted.reason: Uniform and truncated-normal density/CDF routines are compact numeric primitives with clear optimization pathways.
Rotated-rectangle clipping and area intersection logic provides robust geometry-heavy kernels.
Bilinear sampling and grid fill/aggregation loops are practical raster numerical workloads.
Covariance-kernel style numerical matrix construction is valuable for scientific compute optimization.
Sparse bandwidth/profile and permutation loops are strong sparse linear algebra training material.
Edit-distance dynamic programming and sequence operations are broadly useful algorithmic kernels.
Batch quaternion/vector rotation operations are concise geometric numeric patterns.
Buffer-protocol conversion helpers model practical data-interchange and low-copy pipeline logic.

skipped.reason: Primarily a thin native-wrapper class with limited standalone algorithmic optimization value.
Tightly coupled MySQL C-extension glue code is integration-specific and less suitable for generic GRPO kernels.
